# FP User Profile

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by fp-self-evolve. Max ~1375 chars. Preferences only. -->

## Communication
- Prefers Chinese mixed with English technical terms
- Direct, no fluff — values conciseness
- Likes to see file paths and concrete commands

## Workflow
- Always routes through FP skill for engineering work
- Prefers pi as agent harness
- Uses akilecloud sub2api proxy for model access
- Publishes FP to GitHub with proper version tags

## Always / Never
- Always: store API keys in credential manager, not plaintext
- Always: redact secrets from output
- Always: use evidence-led verification before declaring done
- Never: speculative patches before diagnosis
